source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
#poweringyouringenuity  🚀

Our mission is to bridge top-level technology companies with engineering talent from across the globe. With presence in LATAM, USA and Europe, we empower companies by providing remote engineering teams of all levels tailored to the needs of each project.



Our teams are passionate about technology and thrive on challenges. We value technical expertise and a willingness to learn new things. Each development is tailored to the needs of each project, so being passionate about learning and using new languages, tools, and frameworks is part of our DNA. Our software engineering teams focus on best coding practices to ensure readability, reusability, and scalability of our systems' designs and developments.



We are looking for a skilled and motivated Full Stack Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will be instrumental in maintaining and enhancing a critical data ingestion pipeline and a data analysis and visualization tool. You will have the opportunity to work across the full technology stack, contributing to the reliability, performance, and insights derived from our data.


Your role and responsibilities:

 - Maintain, troubleshoot, and optimize our backend built with Python.

 - Develop, maintain, and enhance tools primarily using JavaScript for the frontend and Python for the backend.

 - Interact with robotics, data engineers, and other stakeholders to understand data flow and observability requirements.

 - Implement new features and improvements to both the data ingestion pipeline and the data analysis and visualization tool based on evolving needs.

 - Write clean, well-documented, and testable code.

 - Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving our engineering practices.

 - Stay up-to-date with relevant technologies and industry best practices.
   

What we're looking for:

 - Proven experience as a Full Stack Engineer.

 - Strong proficiency in Python.

 - Solid experience with JS/TS for frontend development.

 - Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

 - Demonstrated willingness and ability to learn new technologies quickly.

 - Strong soft skills, including clear communication, collaboration, and a proactive attitude.

 - Proficient English language skills (B2/C1 level), with comfort in regular 1:1 conversations with native English speakers.
   

Nice to have:

 - Experience with data ingestion technologies such as Apache Beam or Apache Spark.

 - Experience with observability tools and concepts (e.g., logging, metrics, tracing).

 - Familiarity with cloud platforms.

Join us to be part of a dynamic community where your skills and contributions truly matter!

source_jobs.title: Semi Senior Robotics Engineer
source_jobs.description:
#poweringyouringenuity  🚀

Our mission is to bridge top-level technology companies with engineering talent from across the globe. With presence in LATAM, USA and Europe, we empower companies by providing remote engineering teams of all levels tailored to the needs of each project.



Our teams are passionate about technology and thrive on challenges. We value technical expertise and a willingness to learn new things. Each development is tailored to the needs of each project, so being passionate about learning and using new languages, tools, and frameworks is part of our DNA. Our software engineering teams focus on best coding practices to ensure readability, reusability, and scalability of our systems' designs and developments.



We are looking for talented Software Engineers to join our team as Robotics Engineer. In this role, you will collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and work with people from around the world to develop cutting-edge robotics solutions that will shape the future of autonomous systems.

You will contribute to projects that address some of the robotics industry's most complex challenges, including mobile robot navigation, indoor and outdoor localization, fleet management, mission planning and control, high-performance software testing, robotic manipulators, computer vision, simulation, and more.

This is an opportunity to work on innovative technologies, solve complex engineering problems, and make a meaningful impact by delivering software for real-world robotic applications.



Your role and responsibilities:

 - Develop effective and efficient software robotic solutions applying different tech stacks, algorithms and making use of open source software

 - Transmit your passion for technology and professionalism to your peers

 - Be receptive and empathetic with your team and communities

 - Engage in the design and implementation of challenging problems for our customers, R&D and internal technology interest groups

 - Train yourself and other peers within our internal tech dojo

 - Feel motivated to contribute with high quality software to open source projects



If you:

 - Have strong experience (+4 years) coding with modern C++ and Python.

 - Have experience using Docker.

 - Have a degree (Bsc., Msc. or PhD) in Computer Science, Engineering, Robotics or a related field to robotics.

 - Can tackle mid-sized software development tasks independently.

 - Are able to engage in technical implementation conversations, and make proposals.

 - Are proficient in English and feel comfortable engaging in technical discussions and presentations.



It'd be nice if you:

 - Have experience with ROS or ROS 2

 - Are familiar with VSLAM and AI computer vision.

 - Have contributed to open source projects

 - Are an active member of a related interest group and did public speaking on tech topics

Join us to be part of a dynamic community where your skills and contributions truly matter!

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Roboticist
source_jobs.description:
#poweringyouringenuity  🚀

Our mission is to bridge top-level technology companies with engineering talent from across the globe. With presence in LATAM, USA and Europe, we empower companies by providing remote engineering teams of all levels tailored to the needs of each project.



Our teams are passionate about technology and thrive on challenges. We value technical expertise and a willingness to learn new things. Each development is tailored to the needs of each project, so being passionate about learning and using new languages, tools, and frameworks is part of our DNA. Our software engineering teams focus on best coding practices to ensure readability, reusability, and scalability of our systems' designs and developments.



We are looking for talented Software or Robotic Engineers to work in the robotic industry as a Software Developer. You will work with people worldwide creating the technology that will impact how we live in the future. The projects are related to solving the industry's great challenges: mobile robot navigation, indoor and outdoor localization, fleet management, mission planning and control, high-performance software testing, manipulators, computer vision, simulation and much more.



Your role and responsibilities:

 - Develop effective and efficient software robotic solutions applying different tech stacks, algorithms and making use of open source software

 - Transmit your passion for technology and professionalism to your peers

 - Be receptive and empathetic with your team and communities

 - Engage in design and implementation of challenging problems for our customers, R&D and internal technology interest groups

 - Train yourself and other peers within our internal tech dojo

 - Feel motivated to contribute with high quality software to open source projects



If you:

• Have strong experience (+2 years) with ROS or ROS 2.

• Have strong experience (+2 years) coding with modern C++ (17 and beyond) and Python.

• Have experience using Docker.

• Have a degree (Bsc., Msc. or PhD) in Computer Science, Engineering, Robotics or a related field to robotics.

• Are fluent in both Spanish and English and feel comfortable in a bilingual environment.



It'd be nice if you:

• Are familiar with build systems (such as Bazel or Blaze)

• Are familiar with machine learning frameworks like PyTorch and PyTorch Lightning, Ray, etc.

• Have some robotics expertise in perception or mapping.

Join us to be part of a dynamic community where your skills and contributions truly matter!

source_jobs.title: Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
#poweringyouringenuity  🚀

Our mission is to bridge top-level technology companies with engineering talent from across the globe. With presence in LATAM, USA and Europe, we empower companies by providing remote engineering teams of all levels tailored to the needs of each project.



Our teams are passionate about technology and thrive on challenges. We value technical expertise and a willingness to learn new things. Each development is tailored to the needs of each project, so being passionate about learning and using new languages, tools, and frameworks is part of our DNA. Our software engineering teams focus on best coding practices to ensure readability, reusability, and scalability of our systems' designs and developments.



We're looking for a skilled and motivated Data Engineer to join our team at Ekumen.
In this role, you'll help maintain and enhance a critical data ingestion pipeline that supports key decision-making processes and enables our teams to work with reliable, high-quality data.

You'll collaborate closely with data scientists, engineers, and other stakeholders, ensuring smooth data flow, improving observability, and continuously finding ways to make things work better.


What you’ll do

 - Maintain, troubleshoot, and optimize a data ingestion pipeline built with Java and Python.

 - Implement new features and improvements that keep our systems efficient and scalable.

 - Write clean, testable, and well-documented code.

 - Participate in code reviews and share ideas that raise the bar for our engineering practices.

 - Stay curious and up to date with emerging technologies and best practices in data engineering.
   

What we're looking for

 - Proven experience of +4 years as a Data Engineer.

 - Strong proficiency in Java and Python.

 - Solid problem-solving and analytical skills.

 - A collaborative mindset and proactive attitude.

 - Strong English communication skills (B2/C1 level). You'll often interact 1:1 with native speakers.
   

It'd be great if you also have

 - Experience with Apache Beam or Apache Spark.

 - Knowledge of observability tools (logging, metrics, tracing).

 - Familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure.

Join us to be part of a dynamic community where your skills and contributions truly matter!

notes: All postings are tech roles, with a focus on engineering and robotics.
